rule_catalog.rationale: All registered JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and markup partials must be parser-valid.
rule_catalog.remediation: Correct the parser diagnostic at the reported source location.

rule_catalog.rationale: Duplicate top-level declarations can shadow runtime behavior.
rule_catalog.remediation: Keep one canonical declaration and remove the duplicate.

rule_catalog.rationale: Duplicate DOM IDs make UI reads and writes target-dependent across assembled markup.
rule_catalog.remediation: Assign each rendered element a unique ID and update references.

rule_catalog.rationale: Runtime globals and extracted UI cores must load in canonical dependency order.
rule_catalog.remediation: Restore the canonical script order in index.html per tools/extract_ui_cores.py.

rule_catalog.rationale: Split CSS files must load in design-system order.
rule_catalog.remediation: Restore the canonical CSS link order in index.html per tools/extract_ui_css.py.

rule_catalog.rationale: Extracted UI logic must not be duplicated back into index.html inline script.
rule_catalog.remediation: Move the duplicate definition into the canonical *-core.js file and remove it from index.html.

layers.web_shell: index.html shell, boot, delegates, inline orchestration
layers.web_runtime: legacy layer alias retained for inline index.html units
layers.engine: canonical ZHL/VPM engine sources and bundles
